PROP-01b-partial-inv-001.text: auctionCallback must reject calls where msg.sender is not the stored auction contract.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-001.assertion: forall call auctionCallback(from, amount, assetOut, data): msg.sender == s_auction

locations.note: line 103: if msg.sender != address(s_auction) || from != address(this) => revert AccessForbidden()
